title: ASR Outdoor 17pc Ultimate Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit with Folding Sluice Box
description:
Discover new prospecting opportunities with this 17-piece gold mining kit featuring a portable folding aluminum sluice box, three dual riffle gold pans, digging tools, classifiers, magnetic black sand separators, snifter bottles, collection vials, gloves, and a gemstone quality inspection tool. Designed for use at streams, rivers, and other outdoor locations, this complete set helps sort material, recover fine gold, remove unwanted magnetic concentrates, and securely store finds. Suitable for beginners and experienced prospectors seeking a convenient all-in-one setup.

ASR Outdoor 17pc Ultimate Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit with Folding Sluice Box
Take your prospecting adventures to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 17pc Ultimate Miner's Gold Prospecting Kit. Designed for dedicated beginners and experienced prospectors alike, this comprehensive kit includes the essential tools needed for gold recovery, material classification, collection, and inspection in a convenient all-in-one package.

At the center of the kit is a lightweight folding aluminum sluice box engineered for portability and efficient fine gold recovery. Its compact foldable design makes it easy to transport to streams, rivers, and remote prospecting locations while providing dependable performance in the field.

The kit also includes three dual riffle gold pans in 8-inch, 10-inch, and 12-inch sizes, allowing you to process material through multiple stages of separation and recovery. A tri-fold shovel, heavy-duty green scoop, and high-visibility orange trowel provide versatile digging and material handling options for a variety of prospecting environments.

For improved efficiency, two mini classifiers help sort material before panning, while the included 8 lb and 16 lb magnetic black sand separators assist in removing unwanted magnetic material that can obscure fine gold. Once valuable material has been recovered, use the dual 3 oz snifter bottles for collection and transfer, then securely store your findings in the included 3/4 dram and 3 dram glass vials.

To complete the setup, the kit includes prospector's gloves for hand protection and a gemstone quality inspection tool for detailed viewing of gold, gemstones, minerals, and other recovered materials. Whether you're exploring mountain streams, riverbanks, or local creeks, this 17-piece prospecting kit provides the tools needed to help maximize your recovery and enjoy the search for treasure.
Key Features
  • COMPLETE 17PC PROSPECTING KIT - Includes folding aluminum sluice box 3 dual riffle gold pans shovel scoop trowel classifiers magnetic separators snifter bottles collection vials gloves and gemstone quality inspection tool
  • FOLDING ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX - Lightweight portable design folds for transport and storage while helping capture fine gold and concentrate material during recovery
  • THREE DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS - Includes 8 inch 10 inch and 12 inch pans for processing material through multiple stages of separation and gold recovery
  • BLACK SAND SEPARATION TOOLS - Features both 8 lb and 16 lb magnetic separator tools to remove magnetic material and improve visibility of valuable concentrates
  • DIG SORT COLLECT AND INSPECT - Equipped with digging tools classifiers collection accessories protective gloves and a gemstone quality inspection tool for field and hobby use
Specifications
MPN: ASR-FJF75-44F7
UPC: 810131702137
Number of Pieces included: 17
Sluice Box Material: Stainless Steel
Water Resistant: Yes
